selection_basis.ledger_reason: This is the first untouched deep-archive test parent in the strip and the cleanest request-only handoff failure case.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the archive packet-empty run into a smaller batch that preserves request-only boundary failure, clean-but-thin hash integrity, placeholder-heavy saved strategy intent, conceptual seed residue, and packaging-noise limits.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Best next sibling once the packet-empty boundary floor has been preserved.
Useful later direct-run sibling after the packet pair is reduced.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent packet already compresses the exact run-root, packet, and contradiction surfaces needed for a handoff-failure reduction, and the consulted archive A2-mid anchors already preserve archive-only role and sibling-run comparison boundaries.
